task_completion.description: The fuel_cell_voltage dataset is imported into Power BI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'fuel_cell_voltage' table is visible in the Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI interface.

task_completion.description: The report page is correctly named 'Stability Analysis'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active page tab at the bottom of the Power BI report canvas is named 'Stability Analysis'.

task_completion.description: The required DAX measures for the SPC chart are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data/Fields pane shows calculated measures with calculator icons next to them, specifically: 'Global_Mean_Voltage', 'Global_Sigma', 'UCL', and 'LCL'.

task_completion.description: A Line Chart is created plotting Timestamp against Stack_Voltage and the control measures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Line Chart visual is on the canvas. The visual's legend or Y-axis field well contains Stack_Voltage, Global_Mean_Voltage, UCL, and LCL. The chart itself should display a fluctuating line for the voltage and three flat horizontal lines for the mean and control limits.

task_completion.description: The Power BI report is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI application window title bar reads 'Voltage_Stability_Report' or the file 'Voltage_Stability_Report.pbix' is visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the Power BI Desktop GUI to build the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Power BI Desktop interface being actively used (e.g., ribbon interactions, DAX formula bar, field dragging) rather than just a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The control limits are actual calculated measures, not static shapes or hardcoded analytics lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UCL, LCL, and Global_Mean_Voltage appear in the Data pane as measures (calculator icon) and are placed in the visual's Y-axis field well, rather than being drawn as shapes or added via the Analytics pane's 'Constant Line' feature.

integrity.description: The chart displays the genuine synthetic dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The line chart shows a dense, noisy signal (3000 points) with a slight downward drift. The flat mean line should be around 0.71V, UCL around 0.76V, and LCL around 0.66V.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 3000 samples of fuel cell voltage. The Stack_Voltage has a mean of approximately 0.712V and a standard deviation of ~0.0157V. The resulting SPC chart should show a fluctuating voltage line with three flat horizontal lines: Global_Mean_Voltage (~0.712V), UCL (~0.759V), and LCL (~0.665V). The measures must be created using DAX (typically involving CALCULATE and ALL/REMOVEFILTERS to ignore row context) and will appear with calculator icons in the Data pane.
